prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
An inspection on T-009 has just been completed in the field with no abnormal condition observed. Open a work order documenting that the inspection took place, then close it out with a note recording the clean inspection result.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should report the newly created work order identifier and its initial status, then confirm a follow-up update that transitions the work order to a closed state with a closure note referencing the clean inspection finding.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — List all Smart Grid transformer assets
  Step 2: [iot] get_asset_metadata — Get the metadata for T-009 (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] create_work_order — Create a new maintenance work order for T-009 (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order status to "open" and add a note (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [wo] update_work_order — Close the work order with a note (depends on steps [4])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "List all Smart Grid transformer assets",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_assets",
    "tool_args": {
      "tool": "list_assets",
      "health_status": "any",
      "task": "List all Smart Grid transformer assets"
    },
    "response": "Error executing tool list_assets: 1 validation error for list_assetsArguments\nhealth_status\n  Input should be a valid integer, unable to parse string as an integer [type=int_parsing, input_value='any', input_type=str]\n    For further information visit https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/int_parsing",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Get the metadata for T-009",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "get_asset_metadata",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-009"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-009\",\n  \"manufacturer\": \"Schneider Electric\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Gamma\",\n  \"voltage_class\": \"11kV/0.4kV\",\n  \"rating_kva\": 1000,\n  \"install_date\": \"2007-10-19\",\n  \"age_years\": 17,\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"fdd_category\": 1,\n  \"rul_days\": 3039,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Create a new maintenance work order for T-009",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-009",
      "issue_description": "No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.",
      "priority": "Low",
      "fault_type": null,
      "estimated_downtime_hours": null
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-A80F28B9\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T08:37:10.114194Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Update the work order status to \"open\" and add a note",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-A80F28B9",
      "status": "open",
      "priority": null,
      "assigned_technician": null,
      "note": "No abnormal conditions observed during inspection."
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-A80F28B9\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T08:37:10.114194Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": [\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2026-05-05T08:37:10.799434Z\",\n      \"text\": \"No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.\"\n    }\n  ]\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Close the work order with a note",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-A80F28B9",
      "status": "closed",
      "priority": "low",
      "assigned_technician": null,
      "note": "No abnormal conditions observed during inspection."
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-A80F28B9\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-009\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.\",\n  \"priority\": \"low\",\n  \"fault_type\": null,\n  \"status\": \"closed\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 4,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T08:37:10.114194Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": [\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2026-05-05T08:37:10.799434Z\",\n      \"text\": \"No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.\"\n    },\n    {\n      \"timestamp\": \"2026-05-05T08:37:11.507503Z\",\n      \"text\": \"No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.\"\n    }\n  ]\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
A work order documenting the inspection of T-009 has been successfully created and closed with a note recording the clean inspection result. The work order details are as follows:

- Work Order ID: WO-A80F28B9
- Transformer ID: T-009
- Issue Description: No abnormal conditions observed during inspection.
- Priority: Low
- Status: Closed
- Notes: Two notes were added, one when the work order was opened and another when it was closed, both recording the clean inspection result.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": true,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Improve data retrieval accuracy by fixing the list_assets tool error and ensure correct sequence by removing redundant steps."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve data retrieval accuracy by fixing the list_assets tool error and ensure correct sequence by removing redundant steps.
